series_metadata.series_title: Payroll Registers and W-2 rosters by Pay Period
series_metadata.series_description: Agency payroll registers and W-2 rosters containing detailed employee pay information. The records on hand are from pay period ending 1-13-1978 through pay period ending 3-31-2007. These records are on Microfiche only.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain 110 years from the date of the most current record., Microform: Shred
